title: BigBear.ai Holdings Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: BigBear.ai Holdings analyst ratings and price targets from Benzinga. The platform aggregates brokerage research with 2 analysts providing ratings averaging buy with $5.50 average price target. Recent analyst moves include Cantor Fitzgerald downgrade from $7 to $6 target in January 2026. Tracking analyst moves helps identify changing sentiment toward the stock.
